installer-gui-script.title: OpenApe Escapes
installer-gui-script.welcome:
OpenApe Escapes — Privilege elevation via grant-based approval.
This installer will: - Install the escapes binary to /usr/local/bin/ - Set it up with the required setuid root permission - Create /etc/openape/ with a config template - Create /var/log/openape/ for audit logs
After installation, edit /etc/openape/config.toml with your IdP details.
